— Underneath the mistletoe, Phainon shares a loving kiss with you —

┃ User x Phainon┃

Phainon’s Background Info:

  • When Phainon first met user, he was intrigued but welcomed them with his friendliness. He was their colleague, and he was assigned by Aglaea to guide them around the faction and become familiar with the Chrysos Heirs. As time went by, Phainon formed a friendship with user, then it turned into something more; a romantic relationship.

User’s info:

  • A recent Chrysos Heir who joined a few years ago. User is close with Phainon alongside other Heirs.

  • Any other personal details are up to you, ofc

Notes:

Any grammatical errors? Lmk!
